data.title: System: surface-foreground token pairing convention + Publications pair migration

data.body:
Origin: FRAC-21 review caught a real bug — DocumentBadge h3 titles rendered cream on cream because the card surface didn't re-assert its text color, so it inherited text-background from the page-level cascade I introduced. Inline fix landed (text-foreground on card root) but the systemic gap remains.

Standard practice answer (dialogue with Julianna, 2026-06-08): shadcn/Material 3 paired-foreground tokens. Every saturated surface ships an explicit -foreground sibling; neutrals use the implicit background/foreground inverse pair.

Scope:
1. DESIGN.md: add 'Surface foreground pairing' section codifying the rule. Four canonical pairs: (a) neutral light = bg-background + text-foreground, (b) neutral dark = bg-foreground + text-background (implicit inverse, no new token), (c) house light = bg-house-{X}-light + text-house-{X}-light-foreground, (d) house deep = bg-house-{X}-deep + text-house-{X}-deep-foreground.
2. src/index.css: add foreground siblings for the Publications pair (the only house pair declared today after FRAC-21):
   --color-house-publications-light-foreground: var(--color-background);
   --color-house-publications-deep-foreground: var(--color-background);
3. LabPage.tsx call site: replace bg-house-publications-light text-background with bg-house-publications-light text-house-publications-light-foreground. SectorHeader prop unchanged (it's a deep-tier highlight, not a surface).
4. DocumentBadge.tsx: revert the FRAC-21 inline fix (text-foreground on card root) and instead use the canonical pair: bg-background text-foreground (no change in rendering, but on-pattern).
5. audit-prompt.md: add a pairing check to the color audit section so future per-page audits catch unpaired surfaces.
6. Per-house token declarations for the other 5 houses land via their respective per-house Apply tasks (FRAC-23, FRAC-25, FRAC-27, FRAC-29, FRAC-31, FRAC-33, FRAC-35, FRAC-37, FRAC-39) — each task adds its house's pair + foreground siblings following this convention. Not bundled here.

Out of scope: existing pages that already work via the cream/charcoal cascade (Home, Story, etc.). Survey those during the per-page Apply tasks.

Mobile-first: re-verify Lab at 375px after migration; same h3-readability check the dialogue caught.

Branch convention: frac-42-surface-foreground-pairing.

FRAC-42 implementation complete — 4 commits on frac-42-surface-foreground-pairing:

1. 8df8949 — FRAC-20/42: lattice state catchup (absorb pre-existing FRAC-20 wrap-up + FRAC-42 lifecycle dirty files; category-B untracked left alone).
2. 6f10870 — FRAC-42: add Publications light/deep -foreground sibling tokens (src/index.css; both resolve to var(--color-background); FRAC-21 comment block extended).
3. f6e12a9 — FRAC-42: document Surface foreground pairing rule + audit check (DESIGN.md new ### Surface foreground pairing subsection between Text foregrounds and Charcoal drift note; audit-prompt.md ### Surface-foreground pairing check appended as sibling to House-scope/Inversion/Dead-value checks).
4. 882c923 — FRAC-42: migrate LabPage main surface to paired foreground token (single class swap on <main>; selection chrome retained; DocumentBadge verified on-pattern, no edit).

Tests/build state:
- pnpm typecheck: clean.
- pnpm test: 4 failed / 143 passed — exactly the 4 documented baseline failures (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). No new failures.
- pnpm build: succeeds.

Mobile/visual verification:
- Mode: BOTH live dev server (sandbox did not block) AND compiled-CSS inspection.
- Compiled CSS: `.text-house-publications-light-foreground{color:var(--color-background)}` present in dist/assets/index-BoFBfrSB.css; both `--color-house-publications-light-foreground` and `--color-house-publications-deep-foreground` CSS variables declared, both resolving to `var(--color-background)` (cream).
- Dev server: `curl http://localhost:5173/lab` → HTTP 200; served LabPage.tsx confirms the new utility on `<main>` and the retained `selection:text-background` on the same node.
- Rendering: pixel-equivalent at 375px and 1280px (both `text-background` and `text-house-publications-light-foreground` resolve to identical cream value).
- DocumentBadge h3 readability (FRAC-21 fix) preserved — bg-background text-foreground on card root unchanged.

PRD check (FRAC-22): no contradiction. Pixel-equivalent migration is invisible to wayfinding UX; the codified pairing rule strengthens the house-page foundation. Mobile-first respected.

Decision 4 verification logged in commit 4 body: DocumentBadge.tsx card root remains `bg-background text-foreground` (canonical neutral-light pair); no edit needed.

Nothing escalated. Ready for review.

VERDICT: PASS

Reviewed cold against plan at .lattice/plans/task_01KTMFG9QW3JYM6733JC0QWQ02.md.

Checks performed:
- 4 commits on branch frac-42-surface-foreground-pairing match planned commit strategy (lattice catchup, index.css tokens, DESIGN.md+audit-prompt, LabPage migration).
- Decision 1 (DESIGN.md): new "### Surface foreground pairing" subsection placed correctly after "### Text foregrounds" (line 188). Content matches plan verbatim — four canonical pairs table, cream-on-saturated explanation, composition rationale citing FRAC-21 regression, out-of-scope note.
- Decision 2 (src/index.css): both Publications -foreground siblings declared inside @theme inline (lines 53-54), resolved to var(--color-background). Comment block extended with FRAC-42 paragraph per plan.
- Decision 3 (LabPage.tsx): <main> now uses text-house-publications-light-foreground; selection: chrome retained verbatim. Single-line edit, no collateral.
- Decision 4 (DocumentBadge.tsx): git diff master..HEAD shows zero changes; card root still carries `bg-background text-foreground` from FRAC-21. On-pattern, no edit needed.
- Decision 5 (.lattice/notes/audit-prompt.md): "### Surface-foreground pairing check" subsection added at line 309 inside the per-element color audit section. Content matches plan verbatim (table, NEAR classification, selection-chrome exemption, {deep}/{light} display-use exemption, GAP-LOG-AND-MIGRATE for undeclared houses).
- No out-of-scope edits: other 5 house pairs not declared, no DocumentBadge edit, no stray files staged.

Build/test state at HEAD:
- `pnpm typecheck`: clean.
- `pnpm test`: 4 failed / 143 passed — exactly the 4 documented baseline failures (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). No new failures introduced.
- `pnpm build`: succeeds (3.58s).

Verification mode: compiled-CSS (Section C). Did not bring up dev server. Grep on dist/assets/index-BoFBfrSB.css yields `.text-house-publications-light-foreground{color:var(--color-background)}` — confirms rendering-equivalence to the prior `text-background` (both resolve to cream). DocumentBadge card root unchanged at source level, so the FRAC-21 fix (h3 titles charcoal-on-cream at 375px) is structurally preserved.

PRD check: re-read FRAC-22 (.lattice/plans/FRAC-22.md). Mobile-first preserved by being a no-op pixel-wise. No PRD contradiction. Token system rule codified is additive and shadcn-aligned, consistent with PRD's design-system posture.

All 5 plan decisions resolved. All 9 acceptance criteria satisfied. Moving to done.
